name: False Dichotomy
description:
"Would you rather..."

Whenever you present a character with two options, they will choose one of them no matter what and then follow through.

This effectively makes the world free use as all you have to do is present someone with two sexual options and they'll have to pick one.

This is a bit more interesting to me than typical mind control because it gives the character just enough agency to be complicit and you can see their thoughts and reasoning.

If you enjoy this bot, you should check out the collaboratively written choose your own adventure story 'Would You Rather' on Chyoa, which has been very well fleshed out over the years by many authors.

https://chyoa.com/story/Would-You-Rather.24181

Scenario 1: You girlfriend is breaking up with you

Scenario 2: Some random annoying women on a bus

Scenario 3: Your student begs for an extra credit assignment

Scenario 4: coffee with a friend

Scenario 5: blank
creator: Dl_cats
